equivalents_en: the pronunciation of h varies. Sometimes it is pronounced as in Swahili or English

senses.definition_en: the pronunciation of h varies. Sometimes it is pronounced as in Swahili or English, but sometimes it is pronounced very softly, almost like heavy breathing, (e.g. hipha). If you cannot find a word with a ‘soft h’ sound under h in the dictionary, try looking under the following vowel. The letter h between two vowels (e.g. chihi) is always pronounced nasally (as if there were a soft n just before it)
senses.definition_dg: Hirifo h wakati mwingine rinatamkwa dza Chiswahili au Chiingereza, ela wakati mwingine rinatamkwa pole-pole dza kuphephesa. Hirifo h kahi-kahi ya vokali mbiri rinatamkwa na mpumo wa pudzi.

examples.dg: Neno ra 'hipha' rinatamkwa na h ya pole-pole.
examples.en: The word 'hipha' is pronounced with a soft h.
examples.sw: Neno 'hipha' linatamkwa na h laini.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala kichache, kutokuwa chinji.

examples.dg: Chakurya chikahaba mwaka uhu kpwa sababu ya mvula kuhaba.
examples.en: Food was scarce this year because of the lack of rain.
examples.sw: Chakula kilikuwa haba mwaka huu kwa sababu ya ukosefu wa mvua.

senses.definition_dg: Hata, hadi phatu fulani au wakati fulani.

examples.dg: Wasira kazi kula siku hadi dziloni.
examples.en: He worked every day until evening.
examples.sw: Alifanya kazi kila siku hadi jioni.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya adisi.

examples.dg: Bibi wasemera anae hadisi ya kare.
examples.en: Grandmother told her grandchildren a story from long ago.
examples.sw: Bibi aliwaambia wajukuu wake hadithi ya zamani.

senses.definition_en: to mention, to call by name
senses.definition_dg: Kutadza dzina ra mutu au chitu, kusema dzina.

examples.dg: Mwanafundzi akahadza midzi miiri ya tsi ya Amerika
examples.en: The student mentioned two towns in America
examples.sw: Mwanafunzi alitaja miji miwili ya nchi ya Amerika.

equivalents_en: three (form used when preceded by a vowel)

senses.definition_en: three (form used when preceded by a vowel)
senses.definition_dg: Nambari tahu, bada ya mbiri.

examples.dg: Mara ya hahu ndipho ariyofwaulu.
examples.en: The third time is when he succeeded.
examples.sw: Mara ya tatu ndipo alipofaulu.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari tahu, bada ya mbiri.

examples.dg: Mara ya hahu
examples.en: The third time
examples.sw: Mara ya tatu ndipo alipofaulu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala sawa-sawa, kukala na hachi ya kuhenda chitu.

examples.dg: Chila mutu ana haki ya kuishi kpwa amani.
examples.en: Every person has the right to live in peace.
examples.sw: Kila mtu ana haki ya kuishi kwa amani.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuelewa chitu bila shaka.

examples.dg: Nina hakika
examples.en: I am certain/sure
examples.sw: Nina hakika kwamba atakuja leo.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa kpweli, bila shaka yoyosi.

examples.dg: Hakika hundakuteryera kpwa utu wako mnono.
examples.en: Surely we will reward you for your kindness.
examples.sw: Hakika tutakulipa kwa wema wako.

senses.definition_en: to make certain, to investigate, to prove
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chikale cha kpweli, kupeleleza, kuthibitisha.

examples.dg: Hakikisha kala miryango yosi imefungbwa kabila ya kulala.
examples.en: Make sure that all doors are locked before sleeping.
examples.sw: Hakikisha kwamba milango yote imefungwa kabla ya kulala.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mwiri wa nyuma ambayo mutu anasagala nayo.

examples.dg: Proverb: Hako ra mayo ragula vuwe
examples.en: A mother's buttock buys a field (A man will do anything for the woman he loves)
examples.sw: Methali: Tako la mama ni gumu kama jiwe.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhala chitu, kuchukula.

examples.dg: Hala chibao chichi uchiike dzulu ya meza.
examples.en: Take this board and put it on the table.
examples.sw: Chukua ubao huu uweke juu ya meza.

senses.definition_en: to live with a woman before having
senses.definition_dg: Kusagala na mchetu kabila ya kuhenda arusi.

examples.dg: Mutu achihala mchetu bila arusi, atu andagomba.
examples.en: If a man lives with a woman before marriage, people will talk.
examples.sw: Mtu akiishi na mwanamke kabla ya ndoa, watu watasema.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kukaa na mke kabla ya kufanya ndoa

senses.definition_en: decisively, immediately (used as a warning or exhortation)
senses.definition_dg: Kpwa uharaka, mara mwenga bila kukawia.

examples.dg: Hala-hala usikose
examples.en: Act now/decisively and you will not fail
examples.sw: Haraka usikose kukaa hapa!

senses.definition_dg: Bada ya hipho, badaye.

examples.dg: Piga hurya chakurya, halafu uphiye sukuli.
examples.en: First eat food, then go to school.
examples.sw: Kwanza kula chakula, halafu uende shule.

senses.definition_dg: Kufwanana, kukala na sura mwenga.

examples.dg: Hawa ana airi anahalana sana, taweza kuatofautisha.
examples.en: These two children resemble each other so much, you can't tell them apart.
examples.sw: Watoto hawa wawili wanafanana sana, huwezi kuwatofautisha.

equivalents_sw: kukaa pamoja kabla ya kufanya ndoa

senses.definition_en: to live together before marriage, to cohabit
senses.definition_sw: kukaa pamoja kabla ya kufanya ndoa
senses.definition_dg: Kusagala na mutu kabila ya kuhenda arusi.

examples.dg: Ahalana miaka miiri kabila ya kuhenda arusi.
examples.en: They lived together for two years before marrying.
examples.sw: Waliishi pamoja kwa miaka miwili kabla ya kufanya ndoa.

senses.definition_dg: Namna chitu chirivyo, jinsi mutu au chitu chirivyo.

examples.dg: Kama mwanache ana hali ndzuri anadzisikira vinono
examples.en: If the child is in a good condition (is healthy) he will feel well
examples.sw: Kama mtoto ana hali nzuri anajisikia vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na ladha ndzuri, kukala na udufu.

examples.dg: Chakurya chinahama
examples.en: The
examples.sw: Chakula kina ladha kwa sababu kimetiwa maziwa ya nazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na ladha ndzuri, kuhendesa chakurya chikale na udufu.

examples.dg: Chumvi inahamadisha chakurya.
examples.en: Salt makes food taste good.
examples.sw: Chumvi inafanya chakula kiwe na ladha.

senses.definition_en: to be attractive, to be pleasing to the eye
senses.definition_dg: Kupendeza matso, kukala na urembo.

examples.dg: Mutu yuyatu kahama
examples.en: That person is ugly
examples.sw: Mtu yule anapendeza, kila mtu anamtazama.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa mshangao uchiphahana na taabu.

examples.dg: Hamadi! Ni nini richikutukira!
examples.en: Oh no! What has happened to you!
examples.sw: Hamadi! Nini kimetokea kwako!

senses.definition_dg: Kupendeza, kufwahisha.

examples.dg: Mamboge taganihamira
examples.en: I don't like what he is doing
examples.sw: Nguo hazikuinipendeza, sipendi rangi hiyo.

senses.definition_dg: Hamu ya kuhenda chitu au kupata chitu, shauku.

examples.dg: Ana hamu ya kusoma vitabu vinji.
examples.en: He has a desire to read many books.
examples.sw: Ana hamu ya kusoma vitabu vingi.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya keki ndide inayokalangbwa kpwa mafuha.

examples.dg: Bibi wapika hamuri za asubuhi kpwa phamu ya kusherekeya.
examples.en: Grandmother made deep-fried cakes in the morning for the celebration.
examples.sw: Bibi alipika andazi asubuhi kwa ajili ya sherehe.

senses.definition_en: to throw a covering over something
senses.definition_dg: Kuhala nguo au chitu na kuchitandika dzulu ya chitu.

examples.dg: Anahandika chitanda
examples.en: She is making the bed
examples.sw: Anatandika kitanda kwa shuka mpya.

senses.definition_dg: Nguo ya chijadi ya Amijikenda ambayo mchetu anadzifunga chirunoni.

examples.dg: Bibi wavwala hando kpwenye sherehe ya chijadi.
examples.en: Grandmother wore a traditional Mijikenda skirt at the traditional ceremony.
examples.sw: Bibi alivaa kituku kwenye sherehe ya kimila.

senses.definition_dg: Ujanga, neno risiro ra kpweli, udanganyifu.

examples.dg: Proverb: Handzo rinangundya
examples.en: A lie travels fast
examples.sw: Methali: Uongo hunasa.

senses.definition_dg: Msiba, wakati wa kuririra mutu ariyefwa.

examples.dg: Atu anji akpwedza hangani kuririra mutu wao.
examples.en: Many people came to the funeral to mourn their person.
examples.sw: Watu wengi walikuja matangani kumlilia mtu wao.

senses.definition_dg: Ati, kpwa kpweli (neno ra kusemera habari ambayo usiiamini au uisikira kula kpwa mutu).

examples.dg: Nasikira kukala mwenenu mvyere kasikirato, hangbwe ana kombereza
examples.en: I hear that your elder brother does not feel well, apparently he has pneumonia
examples.sw: Nilisikia kwamba ndugu yenu mkubwa si mzima, ati anaugua.

examples.dg: Ni vigumu mutu kukubali kuolagbwa kpwa sababu ya mutu wanjina, hangbwe kpwa mana ana haki
examples.en: It is hard for person to agree to be killed for another person, even because he is righteous

senses.definition_dg: Hangu, kula wakati fulani hadi sambi.

examples.dg: Hangu kare (jadi) mutu nkuphiya windzani na uha na ryaka ra mivi
examples.en: An old custom is that a person goes hunting with a bow and a quiver of arrows
examples.sw: Tangu zamani mtu huenda msituni na upinde na podo ya mishale.

senses.definition_dg: Kutaphika, kulavya chakurya kula tumboni kpwa njira ya kanwa.

examples.dg: Mutu achigbwirwa ni fyokpwa anaweza kuhaphika na kulumwa ni ndani
examples.en: If a person has diarrhoea he may vomit and have stomach pains
examples.sw: Mtu aliyeshikwa na malaria anaweza kutapika.

senses.definition_dg: Hara, neno ra kuonyesa atu ambao unagomba kuahusu (mbali).

examples.dg: Hara ni atu azuri sana.
examples.en: Those are very good people.
examples.sw: Hao ni watu wazuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhala, kuchukula chitu.

examples.dg: Hara chibao uchi kpwa fundi.
examples.en: Take the board to the carpenter.
examples.sw: Chukua ubao umpelekee fundi.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa uharaka, bila kukawia.

examples.dg: Phiya haraka, unakawia!
examples.en: Go quickly, you are late!
examples.sw: Nenda haraka, unachelewa!

equivalents_en: joint effort of group of people

senses.definition_en: joint effort of group of people
senses.definition_dg: Bidii ya phamwenga ya kundi ra atu kuhenda kazi.

examples.dg: Kpwa harakati za atu osi, kazi ikaisha mapema.
examples.en: Through the joint effort of everyone, the work was finished early.
examples.sw: Kwa harakati za watu wote, kazi ilimalizika mapema.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya arusi.

examples.dg: Harusi ya mudu wehu kala ni ndzulu sana.
examples.en: Our relative's wedding was very grand.
examples.sw: Harusi ya ndugu yetu ilikuwa kubwa sana.

senses.definition_dg: Sana kupita vyosi, zaidi ya vyosi.

examples.dg: Twiga ni nyama mrefu hasa vuweni
examples.en: The giraffe is the tallest wild animal
examples.sw: Twiga ni mnyama mrefu zaidi duniani.

equivalents_en: reconcile: only used of a parent restoring good relations with their child

senses.definition_en: to reconcile: only used of a parent restoring good relations with their child, often accompanied by a ceremony in which the parent spits water
senses.definition_dg: Kuuyiza mahusiano kahi-kahi ya mzazi na mwanawe bada ya kutogombana, wakati mwingine na sherehe ambayo mzazi anamtemia mwanawe madzi.

examples.dg: Baba wakamhasa mwanawe bada ya miaka miiri ya kutogombana.
examples.en: The father reconciled with his child after two years of not speaking.
examples.sw: Baba alipatanisha na mtoto wake baada ya miaka miwili ya kutosemezana.

sub_entries.definition_en: cup and gives this to the child

equivalents_en: hephula kueleza mapatano kati ya mzazi na mwanawe

senses.definition_en: hephula kueleza mapatano kati ya mzazi na mwanawe
senses.definition_dg: Kuhephula, kueleza mapatano kahi-kahi ya mzazi na mwanawe.

examples.dg: Mayo walavya hasira na mwanawe kpwa sherehe ndide.
examples.en: The mother restored relations with her child through a small ceremony.
examples.sw: Mama aliondoa hasira na mtoto wake kwa sherehe ndogo.

senses.definition_en: even, so that, until, then, not so
senses.definition_dg: Hata, neno ra kuonyesa kukala chitu chinafwika au chinahendeka hata ichikala kuna taabu.

examples.dg: Hata mvula ikanya, hundaphiya.
examples.en: Even if it rains, we will go.
examples.sw: Hata mvua ikinyesha, tutaenda.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu au mutu kpwenye hatari.

examples.dg: Usende kuko, unahatarisha maishago.
examples.en: Don't go there, you are endangering your life.
examples.sw: Usiende huko, unahatarisha maisha yako.

senses.definition_dg: Karatasi yenye habari muhimu iliyoandikpwa rasmi.

examples.dg: Hala hati yako ya kuzaliwa uphiye nayo ofisini.
examples.en: Take your birth certificate and go with it to the office.
examples.sw: Chukua hati yako ya kuzaliwa uende nayo ofisini.

senses.definition_dg: Mwishowe, bada ya muda mure.

examples.dg: Hatimaye wasira kazi na kufwaulu.
examples.en: Finally he worked hard and succeeded.
examples.sw: Hatimaye alifanya kazi na kufaulu.

senses.definition_en: well, okay: interjection in a conversation and also on saying goodbye
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukubali au kuaga kpwenye mazungumzo.

examples.dg: Haya, hundaonana muhondo.
examples.en: Okay, we will see each other tomorrow.
examples.sw: Haya, tutaonana kesho.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuona haya, aibu, kupweza.

examples.dg: Mwanache ana haya sana, kaweza kugomba mbere za atu.
examples.en: The child is very shy, he cannot speak in front of people.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana haya sana, hawezi kusema mbele ya watu.

senses.definition_dg: Mali ya samani sana ambayo inaikpwa phatu pha siri.

examples.dg: Akaphaha hazina iriyofwitswa kpwenye mundzu wa kare.
examples.en: They found treasure that was hidden in an old ruin.
examples.sw: Walipata hazina iliyofichwa kwenye gofu la zamani.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuambia mutu ahende chitu sambi-sambi, au ra kuandza kugomba chitu.

examples.dg: Ichikala nkagomba makosa, hebu sema makosa nchigogomba
examples.en: If I have said something wrong, well state what it was
examples.sw: Ebu sema ukweli, ni wewe uliyefanya hivyo?

examples.dg: Sambi n'riphi ririro ra mana zaidi, mutu hebu ng'ondzi?
examples.en: Now which is more value, a person or a sheep?

senses.definition_dg: Kuika muhego kpwa ajili ya kugbwira nyama.

examples.dg: Baba wahega muhego wa nyama windzani.
examples.en: Father set a trap for animals in the forest.
examples.sw: Baba alitega mtego wa wanyama msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Kuandika habari kpwa mashine ya kunasihisha.

examples.dg: Wahega nkare yosi ya mkpwutano.
examples.en: He recorded the entire meeting's proceedings.
examples.sw: Alirekodi habari zote za mkutano.

equivalents_en: remove a pot from the fire

senses.definition_en: to remove a pot from the fire
senses.definition_dg: Kuusa sufuriya au nyungu kula mohoni.

examples.dg: Hegula nyungu kpwa sababu chakurya chikaiva.
examples.en: Remove the pot from the fire because the food is cooked.
examples.sw: Epua sufuria kwa sababu chakula kimeiva.

senses.definition_en: to quarrel, to argue, to dispute
senses.definition_dg: Kugombana, kutogombana na mutu, kubishana.

examples.dg: Enehu, amba mwi mu ndugu, mbona mnaheha?
examples.en: Friends, surely you are brothers, so why are you arguing?
examples.sw: Ndugu zangu, ninyi ni familia, mbona mnateta?

senses.definition_dg: Yai ambaro taridzangbwe komala au kutungiwa ni dzogolo wa chilume.

examples.dg: Hehema hairikpwa kpwa sababu taina vidzana.
examples.en: An unfertilized egg is not kept because it has no chick.
examples.sw: Yai ambalo halijarutubishwa halihifadhiwi kwa sababu halina kifaranga.

senses.definition_en: to defend someone in an argument, to back someone up
senses.definition_dg: Kutetea mutu kpwenye mazungumzo au ngʼondo ya maneno.

examples.dg: Mwenecho wakamhehera nduguyae mbere za atu.
examples.en: The sibling defended their brother before people.
examples.sw: Ndugu alimtetea kaka yake mbele ya watu.

equivalents_en: cry or cluck when about to lay eggs (used of a hen)

senses.definition_en: to cry or cluck when about to lay eggs (used of a hen)
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga mayowe ambayo kuku anapiga achitaka kutaga (kuhusu kuku tu).

examples.dg: Kuku wangu anahehera, andataga yai.
examples.en: My hen is clucking, she will lay an egg.
examples.sw: Kuku wangu anatetea, atataga yai.

senses.definition_en: to draw (water), to scoop up water
senses.definition_dg: Kuhala madzi kula kisimani au muhoni kpwa ndoo au chombo.

examples.dg: Achetu aphiya muhoni kuheka madzi.
examples.en: The women went to the river to draw water.
examples.sw: Wanawake walienda mtoni kuteka maji.

sub_entries.definition_en: madzi to feel a sense of grave danger

senses.definition_dg: Kukala mfupha ukagbwa kula phariphe, kutoloka.

examples.dg: Wahemuka mgulu ariphogbwa.
examples.en: He dislocated his leg when he fell.
examples.sw: Alihemuka mguu alipoanguka.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu, kufwanya kazi au dzambo fulani.

examples.dg: Henda kazi yako kabila ya kuteza.
examples.en: Do your work before playing.
examples.sw: Fanya kazi yako kabla ya kucheza.

senses.definition_dg: Ukongo ambao unahendesa migulu au mikpwono kuvimba sana.

examples.dg: Mkare yuya ana hende mguuni, mgulu ukavimba sana.
examples.en: That elder has elephantiasis on his leg, the leg is very swollen.
examples.sw: Mzee yule ana tende mguuni, mguu umevimba sana.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho mutu anahenda, tendo.

examples.dg: Mahendo gako ganadzimanyikana.
examples.en: Your deeds speak for themselves.
examples.sw: Matendo yako yanajisemea.

senses.definition_dg: Kudzusa mwiri au kuepuka chitu, kukwepa.

examples.dg: Wahepa mwamba uriogbwa kula dzulu.
examples.en: He dodged the rock that fell from above.
examples.sw: Alikwepa jiwe lililoanguka kutoka juu.

senses.definition_en: to serve food, to transfer food from a pot to a plate
senses.definition_dg: Kuusa chakurya kula nyunguni na kuchiika kpwenye sahani.

examples.dg: Mayo wahephula wali kula nyunguni.
examples.en: Mother served the rice from the pot.
examples.sw: Mama aliepua wali kutoka nyunguni.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya hitaji.

examples.dg: Herera ni neno ranjine ra hitaji.
examples.en: Herera is another word for hitaji.
examples.sw: Herera ni neno jingine la hitaji.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pharipho bapa, phatu pha tambarare, weruni.

examples.dg: Ng'ombe anariswa kpwenye herera.
examples.en: Cattle are grazed on the plains.
examples.sw: Ng'ombe wanachungwa kwenye tambarare.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na furaha, kukala na raha moyoni.

examples.dg: Mwana achikala na afya nono avyazi nkuhererwa
examples.en: If a child has good health the parents are happy
examples.sw: Mtoto akiwa na afya nzuri, wazazi hufurahi.

senses.definition_dg: Kutserera, kugbwa kpwa sababu phatu phana matope au madzi.

examples.dg: Wahereza kpwenye matope akagbwa.
examples.en: He slipped on the mud and fell.
examples.sw: Aliteleza kwenye matope akaanguka.

senses.definition_dg: Furaha, raha, hali ya kukala na baraka.

examples.dg: Heri kpwa mutu anayeogopha Mulungu.
examples.en: Happiness to the person who fears God.
examples.sw: Heri kwa mtu anayemcha Mungu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhewa chitu, kupewa.

examples.dg: Mwanache wahewa zawadi kpwa kufwaulu.
examples.en: The child was given a gift for succeeding.
examples.sw: Mtoto alipewa zawadi kwa kufaulu.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra kuni au mihi chirivyofungbwa phamwenga.

examples.dg: Nyoka ikatuluka kula ndani ya hiha ra kuni
examples.en: The snake came out of the bundle of firewood
examples.sw: Nyoka ilitoka ndani ya tita ya kuni.

equivalents_en: help lift something onto someone's head

senses.definition_en: to help lift something onto someone's head
senses.definition_dg: Kuterya mutu kuika mzigo chitwani.

examples.dg: Nihike ndoo ya madzi chitwani.
examples.en: Help me lift the water bucket onto my head.
examples.sw: Nitwike ndoo ya maji kichwani.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga sauti ya jogolo asubuhi (kuhusu jogolo tu).

examples.dg: Jogolo wakahika ligundzu na mbingu.
examples.en: The rooster crowed early in the morning.
examples.sw: Jogoo aliwika alfajiri na mapema.

senses.definition_dg: Uphande uhu, uphande uhu.

examples.dg: Mshonadzi anaphirika uzi hiku na hiku
examples.en: The tailor is weaving the thread (lit
examples.sw: Mshonaji anapitisha uzi huku na huku.

examples.dg: Huriphomenya difwirini, gari yaphiya hiku na hiku
examples.en: When we entered the sand the car was skidding (lit
examples.sw: Mshonaji anapitisha uzi huku na huku.

senses.definition_dg: Kumtiya mutu moyo ahende chitu, kumhimiza.

examples.dg: Mwalimu wahimiza anache asomere vinono.
examples.en: The teacher urged the children to study well.
examples.sw: Mwalimu alihimiza watoto wasome vizuri.

senses.definition_en: to hit (with a fist), to strike (lightening)
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga kpwa ngumi au kutupigbwa ni umeme.

examples.dg: Umeme wakahindimiza muhi ukagbwa.
examples.en: Lightning struck the tree and it fell.
examples.sw: Umeme ulipiga mti ukaaanguka.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga sauti kulu, dza ngurumo.

examples.dg: Ngurumo ikahindimiza, anache achiogopha.
examples.en: Thunder boomed, the children were afraid.
examples.sw: Ngurumo ilivuma, watoto waliogopa.

senses.definition_dg: Hawa, atu ario phano mbere zako.

examples.dg: Lolani, hinya ndio mayo na enehu!
examples.en: Look, these are my mother and brothers!
examples.sw: Angalieni, hawa ndio mama na ndugu zangu!

senses.definition_en: them, they, those (people already mentioned or near to the listener)
senses.definition_dg: Hawa, atu ariogombwa au ario phahi-phahi na mutu anayesikiza.

examples.dg: Hinyo ndio atu nchioagomba.
examples.en: Those are the people I was talking about.
examples.sw: Hao ndio watu niliokuwa nikiwazungumzia.

equivalents_en: this (referring to a previously mentioned noun of class 3 or 14)

senses.definition_en: this (referring to a previously mentioned noun of class 3 or 14)
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa chitu cha darasa ra hahu au ra kumi na ne ambacho chikagombwa.

examples.dg: Muho hinyu ndio unaomwagika.
examples.en: This river is the one that is flooding.
examples.sw: Mto huu ndio unaofurika.

equivalents_en: at the time or place of

senses.definition_en: at the time or place of
senses.definition_dg: Kpwenye phatu au wakati fulani.

examples.dg: Hipho Kwale phana mnyevu sana dziloni
examples.en: There at Kwale it is very cold in the evening
examples.sw: Hapo Kwale kuna baridi sana jioni.

examples.dg: Hipho kare sisi kala taumanya kurima vinono
examples.en: At that time, long ago, we didn't know how to farm well
examples.sw: Hapo Kwale kuna baridi sana jioni.

examples.dg: Hipho mwandzo dunia kala taina atu anji
examples.en: In the beginning the world did not have many people
examples.sw: Hapo Kwale kuna baridi sana jioni.

senses.definition_dg: Wakati uhu, ndipho.

examples.dg: Hipho ndipho ariphokpwedza.
examples.en: That is when he came.
examples.sw: Hapo ndipo alipokuja.

senses.definition_en: kare long ago, “Once upon a time”
senses.definition_dg: Hipho kare, zamani sana.

examples.dg: Hipho kare kala phana mutu mmwenga.
examples.en: Once upon a time there was a certain person.
examples.sw: Hapo zamani palikuwa na mtu mmoja.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na ndzala kulu sana.

examples.dg: Anache anahirika kpwa sababu tariya chakurya.
examples.en: The children are starving because they haven't eaten.
examples.sw: Watoto wanakufa njaa kwa sababu hawajala.

equivalents_en: magic charm usually worn around the arm

senses.definition_en: magic charm usually worn around the arm, neck or abdomen, especially by children to protect against or treat various diseases and curses
senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kudzikinga ambacho chinadziwa mkpwononi, shingoni au tumboni, haswa kpwa anache.

examples.dg: Mwanache wavwaliwa hirizi kpwa kumlinda.
examples.en: The child was made to wear a charm to protect him.
examples.sw: Mtoto alivaliwa hirizi kwa kumlinda.

senses.definition_dg: Habari za mambo garigokala kare, historiya.

examples.dg: Mwalimu wafundza historiya ya Adigo.
examples.en: The teacher taught the history of the Digo people.
examples.sw: Mwalimu alifundisha historia ya Wadigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhitaji, kukala na hamu ya kupata chitu.

examples.dg: Ninahitaji madzi ya kunwa.
examples.en: I need drinking water.
examples.sw: Ninahitaji maji ya kunywa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhitaji, kukala na hamu ya kupata chitu.

examples.dg: Ninahitaji madzi ya kunwa.
examples.en: I need drinking water.
examples.sw: Ninahitaji maji ya kunywa.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho mutu anahitaji, haja.

examples.dg: Hitaji ra kpwandza ni chakurya na madzi.
examples.en: The first need is food and water.
examples.sw: Hitaji la kwanza ni chakula na maji.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutokuwa sawa, kosa au tofauti.

examples.dg: Kuna hitilafu kahi-kahi ya maneno gako na gakege.
examples.en: There is a difference between your words and his.
examples.sw: Kuna hitilafu kati ya maneno yako na yake.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya sambi.

examples.dg: Hivi sambi ni neno ra kuonyesa wakati uhu.
examples.en: Right now is a phrase showing this time.
examples.sw: Hivi sasa ni neno la kuonyesha wakati huu.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu yuya, mutu ariyegombwa.

examples.dg: Mjeni hiye kala kamanywa arivyo
examples.en: No one knew much about that stranger
examples.sw: Mgeni yule hakujulikana alivyo.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu yuhu, mutu ario phano.

examples.dg: Hiyu ndiye mwalimu wehu.
examples.en: This is our teacher.
examples.sw: Huyu ndiye mwalimu wetu.

equivalents_en: expression used as a polite inquiry before entering a house or room: unless an answer is given

senses.definition_en: expression used as a polite inquiry before entering a house or room: unless an answer is given, usually karibu, 'welcome', good manners
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kulamusa mbere ya kuinjira nyumba ya mutu, kuomba ruhusa ya kuinjira.

examples.dg: Hodi! Kuna mutu nyumbani?
examples.en: Hello! Is anyone at home?
examples.sw: Hodi! Kuna mtu nyumbani?

senses.definition_en: to press (e.g. a button), to test for ripeness
senses.definition_dg: Kubiga chitu kpwa chala, dza chifungo au kupima tunda ichikala rikaiva.

examples.dg: Hofya embe ulole ichikala rikaiva.
examples.en: Press the mango to see if it is ripe.
examples.sw: Bofya embe uone kama limeiva.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzama kpwenye madzi na kufwa.

examples.dg: Mwanache wahoha muhoni kpwa sababu kamanya kuogelea.
examples.en: The child drowned in the river because he didn't know how to swim.
examples.sw: Mtoto alizama mtoni kwa sababu hakujua kuogelea.

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya jasho kula mwirini.

examples.dg: Ninahoka kpwa sababu ya joto kulu.
examples.en: I am sweating because of the great heat.
examples.sw: Ninatoka jasho kwa sababu ya joto kali.

equivalents_sw: kutolika kwa sababu ya kutopikwa vizuri

senses.definition_en: to be undercooked and therefore inedible
senses.definition_sw: kutolika kwa sababu ya kutopikwa vizuri
senses.definition_dg: Kutokuiva vinono na kutokurwa (kuhusu viazi au mihogo).

examples.dg: Mihogo ikaholola, taiweza kurya.
examples.en: The cassava was undercooked and inedible.
examples.sw: Mihogo haikuiva vizuri, haiwezekani kuila.

senses.definition_en: fever, sickness, used as a general term but also for malaria
senses.definition_dg: Ukongo wa mwiri ambawo unahendesa mwiri kukala na joto, neno ra kawaida ra kukala mutu si mzima.

examples.dg: Mwanache ana homa, mphiye naye hospitalini.
examples.en: The child has a fever, take him to the hospital.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana homa, mpeleke hospitalini.

senses.definition_dg: Kusagala na mutu chizani (neno ra kawaida).

examples.dg: Proverb: Ukahomba moho ukaphya mivuzi
examples.en: You had sex in the fire and you burnt your pubic hair
examples.sw: Methali: Ukicheza na moto utaungua midomo.

examples.dg: Watiya mahondzage ryakani
examples.en: He put his arrows in the quiver

senses.definition_dg: Kuumwa ni nyoka (kuhusu nyoka tu).

examples.dg: Nkahondzwa ni nyoka
examples.en: I have been bitten by a snake
examples.sw: Niliumwa na nyoka mguuni.

equivalents_en: type of wild fruit with a yellow shell containing large edible seeds
equivalents_sw: aina ya matunda ya mwituni yenye rangi ya manjano na mbegu zake zinaliwa

senses.definition_en: type of wild fruit with a yellow shell containing large edible seeds
senses.definition_sw: aina ya matunda ya mwituni yenye rangi ya manjano na mbegu zake zinaliwa
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya tunda ra mwitu renye ganda ra njano na mbegu kulu zinazorwa.

examples.dg: Honga ni tunda ra mwitu renye ladha ndzuri.
examples.en: Honga is a wild fruit with a good taste.
examples.sw: Honga ni tunda la mwituni lenye ladha nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuripha mutu fedha ili akuhendere upendeleo, rushwa.

examples.dg: Usihonge mutu, hipho ni kosa ra shariya.
examples.en: Don't bribe a person, that is a crime.
examples.sw: Usihonge mtu, hiyo ni kosa la sheria.

equivalents_en: test for ripeness with one's fingers

senses.definition_en: to test for ripeness with one's fingers
senses.definition_dg: Kupima tunda kpwa vyala ulole ichikala rikaiva.

examples.dg: Hopa embe kpwa chala ulole ubivu.
examples.en: Feel the mango with your finger to check ripeness.
examples.sw: Bofya embe kwa kidole uone ubivu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuponda chitu, kuseta.

examples.dg: Wahopeza karanga na chinu.
examples.en: She crushed the peanuts with a mortar.
examples.sw: Aliponda karanga kwa kinu.

equivalents_en: splash water over someone or something
equivalents_sw: kumwagia maji juu ya mtu ama kitu fulani

senses.definition_en: to splash water over someone or something
senses.definition_sw: kumwagia maji juu ya mtu ama kitu fulani
senses.definition_dg: Kumwagira mutu au chitu madzi dzulu.

examples.dg: Anahosa mwanawe madzi kpwa kumoga.
examples.en: She splashes water over her child to bathe him.
examples.sw: Anamwagia mtoto wake maji kumuosha.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzamisha mutu au chitu kpwenye madzi.

examples.dg: Usimhose mwanache kpwenye madzi!
examples.en: Don't drown the child in the water!
examples.sw: Usimzamishe mtoto majini!

equivalents_en: be well off (i.e. a bit wealthy)

senses.definition_en: to be well off (i.e. a bit wealthy)
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mali kidide, kukala mutu wa katikati si maskini wala si tajiri.

examples.dg: Mutu yuya anahosa-hosa, ana chake kidide.
examples.en: That person is well off, he has a little of his own.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni tajiri wa wastani, ana mali kidogo.

senses.definition_dg: Sisi hosi, atu osi phamwenga.

examples.dg: Hosi hundaphiya msikitini rero.
examples.en: We will all go to the mosque today.
examples.sw: Sote tutaenda msikitini leo.

senses.definition_en: restaurant or bar, not usually with accommodation
senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha kuuzira na kunwa chakurya, ela si phatu pha kulala.

examples.dg: Hundakpwendya hurya hotelini kpwa sababu mayo kaphikire rero.
examples.en: We will go eat at a restaurant because mother did not cook today.
examples.sw: Tutaenda kula hotelini kwa sababu mama hakupika leo.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno garigotayarishwa kugombwa mbere za atu.

examples.dg: Chifu walavya hotuba ndzuri kpwenye mkpwutano.
examples.en: The chief gave a good speech at the meeting.
examples.sw: Chifu alitoa hotuba nzuri kwenye mkutano.

equivalents_en: nest of a twazi made from a kind of gum or resin

senses.definition_en: nest of a twazi made from a kind of gum or resin
senses.definition_dg: Nyumba ya nyuchi aina ya twazi inayodzengbwa na utomvu.

examples.dg: Hozi ra twazi rinaonekana kpwenye muhala wa muhi.
examples.en: The stingless bee's nest is seen on the branch of the tree.
examples.sw: Nyumba ya twazi inaonekana kwenye tawi la mti.

equivalents_en: husu inayotengezwa na gamu ama utomvu

senses.definition_en: husu inayotengezwa na gamu ama utomvu
senses.definition_dg: Utomvu au gamu inayohumirwa ni nyuchi aina ya twazi kudzenga nyumba yao.

examples.dg: Twazi anahumira hu kudzenga hozi.
examples.en: The stingless bee uses resin to build its nest.
examples.sw: Twazi hutumia utomvu kujenga nyumba yake.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukala, kuonyesa kukala sisi ndio chitu fulani.

examples.dg: Sisi piya hu anae
examples.en: We are also his children
examples.sw: Sisi sote ni watoto wake.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba neno ra Mulungu mbere za atu.

examples.dg: Muhubiri wahubiri kpwenye kanisa siku ya Jumapili.
examples.en: The preacher preached at the church on Sunday.
examples.sw: Mhubiri alihubiri kanisani siku ya Jumapili.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kuterya atu, kazi ya kuhenda mambo ga Mulungu.

examples.dg: Huduma hino ni ya kuterya achiya.
examples.en: This ministry is for helping the poor.
examples.sw: Huduma hii ni ya kusaidia maskini.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kulamusa mutu mmwenga, kumuuza hali.

examples.dg: Hujambo mwenehu, u phephi?
examples.en: Hello my friend, how are you?
examples.sw: Hujambo ndugu yangu, u hali gani?

senses.definition_dg: Uamuzi wa hakimu au muamuli kuhusu kosa.

examples.dg: Hukumu ya kesi iriyo ikagombwa ichikala ni kuriphishwa fedha.
examples.en: The judgement of the case that was argued was a fine.
examples.sw: Hukumu ya kesi iliyobishaniwa ilikuwa kulipa faini.

senses.definition_en: to judge, to sentence, to condemn
senses.definition_dg: Kuamua kosa ra mutu, kuripha adhabu.

examples.dg: Hakimu wakamhukumu mwivi miaka miiri jela.
examples.en: The judge sentenced the thief to two years in prison.
examples.sw: Hakimu alimhukumu mwizi miaka miwili jela.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga kihoro kpwa sababu ya malumizi au taabu.

examples.dg: Proverb: Asiyemanya kuhula kadzangbwe- lumwa
examples.en: He who doesn't know groaning has not yet been in pain
examples.sw: Methali: Asiyejua kuugua hajaumwa kamwe.

equivalents_en: put down a load carried on one's head

senses.definition_en: to put down a load carried on one's head
senses.definition_dg: Kutua mzigo urio chitwani, kuika photsi.

examples.dg: Mchetu wahula ndoo ya madzi chitwani.
examples.en: The woman put down the water bucket from her head.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alitua ndoo ya maji kichwani.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuishi kpwa binadamu, tabiya za mutu.

examples.dg: Hulka ya mutu inamanya ni mutu wa aina yani.
examples.en: A person's character shows what kind of person they are.
examples.sw: Hulka ya mtu inaonyesha ni mtu wa aina gani.

equivalents_en: be undercooked and therefore inedible (used of tubers only

senses.definition_en: to be undercooked and therefore inedible (used of tubers only, e.g
senses.definition_dg: Kutokuiva vinono (kuhusu mihogo au viazi), kukala ngumu na kusarikiwa.

examples.dg: Mihogo hino ikahuluka, taiweza kurya.
examples.en: This cassava is undercooked, we cannot eat it.
examples.sw: Mihogo hii haijaiva vizuri, hatuwezi kuila.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kutolika kwa sababu ya kutopikwa vizuri (muhogo na viazi tu)

examples.dg: Manga akahuluka; karika
examples.en: The cassava is undercooked; it is inedible

senses.definition_dg: Kuhuma mutu phatu, kumhuma mutu ahende chitu.

examples.dg: Baba wanihuma dukani kununula chumvi.
examples.en: Father sent me to the shop to buy salt.
examples.sw: Baba alinituma dukani kununua chumvi.

equivalents_en: protruding flower stalk on which bananas develop

senses.definition_en: protruding flower stalk on which bananas develop
senses.definition_dg: Ua ra mundzu wa migomba ambaro ndizi zinakomala kula kpwaro.

examples.dg: Humba ya migomba yosi itadzala kpwa miezi miiri.
examples.en: All the banana stalks will bear fruit in two months.
examples.sw: Humba za migomba yote zitazaa kwa miezi miwili.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphasuka, kukala chitu chinaphasuka dza phuto au jiphu.

examples.dg: Jiphu rinahumbuka richikala tayari.
examples.en: A boil bursts when it is ready.
examples.sw: Jipu linapasuka linapokuwa tayari.

equivalents_en: burst something (e.g. a boil or a football)

senses.definition_en: to burst something (e.g. a boil or a football)
senses.definition_dg: Kuphasua chitu, dza jiphu au mpira.

examples.dg: Mkpwongo wahenda maphu, gachihumbuka na gachikala vironda
examples.en: The patient developed boils, and they burst and became sores
examples.sw: Kidonda kilifanya mapovu, vikapasuka na kuwa vidonda.

equivalents_en: remove guts (e.g. from a slaughtered hen or goat)

senses.definition_en: to remove guts (e.g. from a slaughtered hen or goat)
senses.definition_dg: Kuusa utumbo wa nyama iriyotsindzbwa, dza kuku au mbuzi.

examples.dg: Muhondo mchetu wahumbula kuku ariyotsindzbwa.
examples.en: The next day the woman removed the guts of the slaughtered chicken.
examples.sw: Siku iliyofuata mwanamke alitumbua kuku aliyechinjwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuterya mutu na kumhendere kazi, kuhenda huduma.

examples.dg: Humikira azee ako kpwa moyo mnono.
examples.en: Serve your elders with a good heart.
examples.sw: Tumikia wazee wako kwa moyo mzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira chitu, kuhenda kazi na chitu.

examples.dg: Humira sabuni unaphofula nguwo.
examples.en: Use soap when you wash clothes.
examples.sw: Tumia sabuni unapofua nguo.

equivalents_en: pick fruits or leaves from a plant

senses.definition_en: to pick fruits or leaves from a plant
senses.definition_dg: Kuvuna matunda au makodze kula muhini.

examples.dg: Dzana náhunda papali rangu
examples.en: Yesterday I picked my pawpaw
examples.sw: Jana nilitunda mapapai yangu.

equivalents_en: something which is either unknown or not liked

senses.definition_en: something which is either unknown or not liked
senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho mutu kamanyire ni chitu gani au ambacho kaphendera.

examples.dg: Ni hunde rani?
examples.en: What is that?
examples.sw: Ni kitu gani hiki?

senses.definition_dg: Chibero chidzengbwacho na makodze ga mnazi.

examples.dg: Mayo waika mihogo kpwenye hundu.
examples.en: Mother put cassava in the coconut-leaf basket.
examples.sw: Mama aliweka mihogo kwenye pakacha.

senses.definition_dg: Bila chitu, bure, tu.

examples.dg: Usisikire maneno mahuphu
examples.en: Do not listen to meaningless words
examples.sw: Usisikilize maneno matupu.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala chiphole, kutokuhenda kelele.

examples.dg: Hurira phano, baba analala.
examples.en: Be quiet here, father is sleeping.
examples.sw: Tulia hapa, baba analala.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kusikira utsungu kpwa mutu ariye na taabu, mbazi.

examples.dg: Mutu wa huruma ni mutu wa kuterya ayae.
examples.en: A merciful person is one who helps others.
examples.sw: Mtu wa huruma ni mtu wa kusaidia wengine.

senses.definition_dg: Uhusiano kahi-kahi ya atu airi au zaidi.

examples.dg: Husiano wehu ni wa miaka minji.
examples.en: Our relationship is of many years.
examples.sw: Uhusiano wetu ni wa miaka mingi.

senses.definition_en: to relate to, to be concerned with, to apply to
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na uhusiano na dzambo fulani, kukala ni wa dzambo hiro.

examples.dg: Atu osi anaohusika na dzambo hiri naahedze.
examples.en: All people concerned with this matter should come.
examples.sw: Watu wote wanaohusika na jambo hili waje.

senses.definition_en: to concern, to relate to, to be about
senses.definition_dg: Kuhusu, kukala kuhusu dzambo fulani.

examples.dg: Dzambo hiri rinanihusu
examples.en: This matter concerns me
examples.sw: Jambo hili linahusu mimi pia.

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya nkare za maneno mbere za atu, kugomba hotuba.

examples.dg: Mwalimu walavya hutuba kpwenye sherehe ya kufundza.
examples.en: The teacher gave a speech at the graduation ceremony.
examples.sw: Mwalimu alitoa hotuba kwenye sherehe ya kuhitimu.

equivalents_en: creamy milk got by grating coconut and straining the pulp (with water)

senses.definition_en: creamy milk got by grating coconut and straining the pulp (with water)
senses.definition_dg: Tui ya nazi ambayo inaphahikana kpwa kukuna nazi na kuchipa na madzi.

examples.dg: Ika huwi kpwenye mchuzi wa samaki undauhendesa uhame.
examples.en: Put coconut cream in the fish stew, it will make it tasty.
examples.sw: Weka tui kwenye mchuzi wa samaki utaufanya uwe na ladha.

examples.dg: Huwi rinahumirwa kujitira vyakurya
examples.en: Coconut milk is used for cooking food

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kusikira utsungu moyoni, huzuni.

examples.dg: Huzuni kulu ikamgbwira ariphoona hali hiyo.
examples.en: Great sorrow seized him when he saw that situation.
examples.sw: Huzuni kubwa ilimshika alipoona hali hiyo.

equivalents_sw: remove the husks from grain by pounding in a mortar; kutwanga

senses.definition_sw: to remove the husks from grain by pounding in a mortar; kutwanga
senses.definition_dg: Kuhwa muhanga kpwa kinu kuusa maganda ga mtsere.

examples.dg: Achetu ahwa mtsere kpwa kinu cha chijadi.
examples.en: The women pound grain with a traditional mortar.
examples.sw: Wanawake wanatwanga nafaka kwa kinu cha kimila.
